text.title: Puppeteer Launch & Navigation Setup Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules grounding the puppeteer-launch-setup methodology. Each pairs a binary check + sourced rationale.

rule.statement: When launching in Docker / CI / serverless, the launch config MUST include --no-sandbox and --disable-setuid-sandbox. Sandbox flags MUST stay enabled in local dev so behaviour mismatches are caught early.
rule.rationale: Containers run as root or in user namespaces where the Chromium sandbox cannot initialise; missing flags produce cryptic 'No usable sandbox' errors. Keeping sandbox on locally surfaces real issues before deploy.

rule.statement: package.json MUST set a Chromium revision (PUPPETEER_SKIP_DOWNLOAD + explicit version OR @sparticuz/chromium pinned). Floating Chromium versions are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Chrome auto-update via puppeteer install drifts the bundled version; pinning prevents silent CI failures across runs.

rule.statement: PUPPETEER_CACHE_DIR MUST be set to a writable path in CI/serverless. The default ~/.cache/puppeteer breaks in read-only containers.
rule.rationale: Puppeteer downloads Chrome to PUPPETEER_CACHE_DIR; read-only home directories silently fail install.

rule.statement: browser.close() MUST be called in a finally block. An orphan Chromium process is forbidden after script exit.
rule.rationale: Node process exit does not guarantee browser cleanup; finally ensures release on both normal exit and unhandled exceptions. Orphan browsers pin GBs of RAM.

rule.statement: page.goto MUST use waitUntil='domcontentloaded' as the default. waitUntil='networkidle0' is allowed only on classic server-rendered pages, never on SPAs with WebSocket/SSE/analytics traffic.
rule.rationale: networkidle0 hangs forever on SPAs that never reach zero in-flight requests; agents loop until timeout.

rule.statement: page.setDefaultTimeout MUST be set explicitly and below the wall-clock budget of the wrapping process. Relying on the 30s default is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Without an explicit timeout, hung waits silently exhaust the parent budget; explicit timeouts make failure observable.
